articles.title: Connor Wong’s 3-RBI night helped power Red Sox win, and it couldn’t come at a better time for him individually
articles.description:
Wong finds himself the low man on the catching totem pole, but his 3-RBI night could help his place in the lineup.

The post Connor Wong’s 3-RBI night helped power Red Sox win, and it couldn’t come at a better time for him individually appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Connor Wong drove in 3 RBIs, leading the Red Sox to victory.
Wong's performance comes as he struggles for playing time behind other catchers.
His success may improve his position in the Red Sox lineup moving forward.

articles.title: Legacy not half bad, but Current pull out win before NWSL break on Temwa Chawinga’s 69th-minute goal
articles.description:
The loss marked the 11th time this season the Legacy (2-7-3, 9 points) have conceded first.

The post Legacy not half bad, but Current pull out win before NWSL break on Temwa Chawinga’s 69th-minute goal appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Current defeated Legacy 1-0 on Temwa Chawinga's 69th-minute goal.
Legacy has now conceded first in 11 of 12 games this season.
Boston residents see Legacy struggling with a 2-7-3 record, impacting local sports enthusiasm.

articles.title: Jerry Remy and Dennis Eckersley tough acts to follow, but Lou Merloni and Will Middlebrooks serve Red Sox audiences well
articles.description:
"Merloni and Middlebrooks don’t hedge from criticizing when circumstances call for it."

The post Jerry Remy and Dennis Eckersley tough acts to follow, but Lou Merloni and Will Middlebrooks serve Red Sox audiences well appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Lou Merloni and Will Middlebrooks provide critical commentary for Red Sox fans.
They follow iconic commentators Jerry Remy and Dennis Eckersley.
Their candid analysis enhances viewer engagement for Boston's baseball audience.

articles.title: Sonny Gray continues to be great addition to Red Sox rotation, earns 6th win vs. Guardians
articles.description:
Gray went six innings Saturday for the third time this month.

The post Sonny Gray continues to be great addition to Red Sox rotation, earns 6th win vs. Guardians appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Sonny Gray secured his 6th win for the Red Sox against the Guardians.
Gray pitched six innings for the third time this month, showcasing consistency.
His performance strengthens the Red Sox rotation, benefiting local fans and playoff hopes.
